title: Transcriptomics in Human Challenge Models.
author: Barton AJ Hill J Pollard AJ Blohmke CJ
content: S-EPMC5741696 PMC5741696 Transcriptomics in Human Challenge Models. Human challenge models, in which volunteers are experimentally infected with a pathogen of interest, provide the opportunity to directly identify both natural and vaccine-induced correlates of protection.
